2.0 Methods 

Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
Impact of Transition from 27 to 30 CCW Chronic Conditions │ March 2022 │ V 1.0 2 

The 27 and 30 CCW Chronic Conditions are annual files containing summarized clinical information for all beneficiaries 
included in the requested cohort. The files include two variables4 for each of the chronic conditions: 

1. Yearly indicator (or end-of-year indicator) — indicates whether the beneficiary met each of the chronic condition 
definitions during the
